hypothesis: Tune num_leaves to 512 with learning_rate=0.03 and Tweedie variance power=1.2. Previous experiments with num_leaves=255/256 and Tweedie 1.2 at lr=0.03/0.04 all scored 0.94513. Trying num_leaves=512 to give the model more capacity to capture complex interactions, combined with Tweedie 1.2 and lr=0.03. Deeper trees with more leaves may better capture the feature interactions from our rich feature set (lag_365, dow_roll_mean, etc).
